email: The :attribute field must be a valid email
min: The :attribute field must be at least :param characters
max: The :attribute field must be at most :param characters
gte: The :attribute field must be greater than or equal to :param
lte: The :attribute field must be less than or equal to :param
gt: The :attribute field must be greater than :param
lt: The :attribute field must be less than :param
len: The :attribute field must have length of :param
eq: The :attribute field must be equal to :param
ne: The :attribute field must not be equal to :param
oneof: The :attribute field must be one of: :param
alpha: The :attribute field must contain only letters
alphanum: The :attribute field must contain only letters and numbers
url: The :attribute field must be a valid URL
uuid: The :attribute field must be a valid UUID
datetime: The :attribute field must be a valid date with format :param
json: The :attribute field must be valid JSON
boolean: The :attribute field must be a boolean
eqfield: The :attribute field must be equal to :param field
nefield: The :attribute field must not be equal to :param field
gtfield: The :attribute field must be greater than :param field
ltfield: The :attribute field must be less than :param field
containsany: The :attribute field must contain at least one of: :param
excludesall: The :attribute field must not contain any of: :param
invalid_type: The :attribute field: invalid type, expected :expected but got :got
isDate: The :attribute field must be a valid date in YYYY-MM-DD format
isDateTime: The :attribute field must be a valid datetime
isTime: The :attribute field must be a valid time in HH:MM:SS format
isPhone: The :attribute field must be a valid phone number
isNIK: The :attribute field must be a valid NIK (16 digits)
isNPWP: The :attribute field must be a valid NPWP
isSlug: The :attribute field must be a valid slug (lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes)
notEmpty: The :attribute field must not be empty
isPositive: The :attribute field must be a positive number
isNonNegative: The :attribute field must not be negative
